title: Sass & Belle Blue Willow Mum Mug – I Love You Mum Floral Coffee Tea Mug Gift for Her – Ceramic Cup for Mother's Day, Birthday, or Everyday Thoughtful Moments
features: Thoughtful Mum Gift Idea: This beautifully designed Sass & Belle mug makes a meaningful and heartfelt gift for mum, whether it's for her birthday, Mother's Day or just because she deserves a special moment with her morning coffee or tea.

Floral Blue Willow Pattern: Featuring an elegant blue floral motif, this decorative tea mug adds charm to any kitchen collection, blending classic style with modern sentimentality for a timeless keepsake.
Durable & Practical Design: Made from high-quality kaolin ceramic, this mum mug is both microwave and dishwasher safe, offering convenience for everyday use while maintaining its stylish appearance.
Perfect Size for Tea or Coffee: With a generous capacity and comfortable handle, this ceramic cup is ideal for enjoying hot drinks, whether she loves coffee, herbal tea, or a cosy cocoa moment.

Ideal Gift for Mum from Daughter or Son: Show your appreciation with this lovely personalised-style present. It’s more than just a cup – it’s a warm, thoughtful reminder of your love every time she takes a sip.
description: Show your mum just how much she means to you with the Sass & Belle Blue Willow Mum Mug – a beautifully crafted ceramic cup designed to bring comfort, charm, and appreciation with every sip. Adorned with a delicate blue floral pattern inspired by classic willow motifs, this elegant tea mug features the heartfelt message “I Love You Mum” printed inside the rim, adding a sweet surprise with every use. Whether she's enjoying her morning brew, winding down with evening tea, or stealing a peaceful moment to herself, this ceramic mug is the perfect companion. It’s made from durable kaolin, is microwave and dishwasher safe, and ideal for daily use. The size and shape are designed for a comfortable grip, making it as practical as it is meaningful. Perfect as a gift for mum, it suits birthdays, Mother’s Day, or any time you want to show your appreciation. Whether you're searching for gift ideas for her, a personalised mum mug, or simply a coffee mug that feels special, this Sass and Belle mug is a thoughtful choice. It also makes a lovely decorative mug for display on shelves or desks. Let your mum start every day with a reminder of your love – wrapped in a cup that’s as beautiful as she is.
